introduction: SYNOPSISThe poet is a young skeptic who decides to kill himself after feeling the fatigue of an empty summer city. On his way to a mountain far removed from the city, he meets a woman, who like himself, has been abandoned. He is enthralled by the unconscious woman and makes love to her in the forest and takes her to her apartment. The poet begins to write poems about her, sexuality and sexual freedom. 'She is the queen of roses. I am the poet who offers passion and love to her. She came from the land of roses where there exists no shame, no violence, no sin and no jealousy. A beautiful queen rules the land of the roses but with the birth of the princess sin is born with her. The queen's husbands kill each other and even the queen is killed. A despot takes the princess as his bride.' Awakened from a fantasy of spending pleasant days with the princess, the poet finds himself left alone sans the woman, sans clothes and sans poem scripts.故事持怀疑态度的青年诗人感到无聊，一个夏天空我市决定自杀。他，浏览小山远离中心，发现自己甩像个淑女。诗人在树林外遇吸引了她的无意识啮合使她走进了公寓。诗人随时失控的她将建立一个城市的无性别和她的材料。“她是玫瑰皇后。我是一个专门为她的激情和热爱的诗人。她来自远东远东的英国玫瑰没有嫉妒，没有无辜的将是艰难的不隐瞒任何事情。玫瑰的国家有超过所有nateumyeon她的公主罪发生seobuteo一个美丽的王后统治。女王的丈夫被杀害，甚至最后女王是另一种杀了一个暴君需要一个美丽的公主为妻。“诗人然后公主想象eurona送快乐的日子构成了梦幻城堡可我一觉醒来，女人也，衣服稿件有没有什么留给他。
